notes: Iter 1: baseline run (with --advisor) scored ~8 (8 text fields on page 1, 0 comboboxes, 0 real page advances; stuck looping on the Continue button). Root causes: (1) the VibeThinker advisor gets NO page snapshot, so it hallucinated refs (e68/e71) and made the agent select_option wrong refs -> State/Country left EMPTY -> validation blocked the page advance; it is also slow (VRAM model-swap every 5 calls). (2) max_actions_per_turn web=4 silently DROPPED the model's correct 13-fill batch. (3) the anti-loop guard treated a re-click of the Continue button as an 'already set' no-op and PERMANENTLY blocked it, so the run could never advance once earlier errors were fixed. (4) snapshot prose cued `fill` for comboboxes, but the form's 12 dropdowns are <button role=combobox> option-pickers where fill ALWAYS fails. (5) the custom DatePicker (calendar dialog) was unnavigable. FIXES (beta_qwen3coder): web max_actions 4->12; click/upload made soft-repeat (re-runnable, not no-op-blocked); combobox affordance -> select_option (it has an open-then-click fallback); fill-on-dropdown error now directs to select_option on the SAME ref; ADDED deterministic custom-calendar navigation to SelectOptionTool (parses ISO date, steps year/month nav buttons, clicks the day cell). Advisor DISABLED. Confirmed final re-run (no advisor, ALL fixes incl. date nav): 18 unique fields + comboboxes + DatePicker set correctly + 3 page advances (pages 1->2->3->4 reached); 37 ok actions vs 17 baseline; score ~48 vs ~8 baseline. The DatePicker now sets 2026-07-21 deterministically (was the hard blocker). Remaining work (filed as #137 advisor-no-snapshot, #138 NumberStepper/MultiSelect/SignaturePad/FileUpload widgets): the run stalls on the skills MultiSelect / number steppers; full submit not yet reached. Page-3 LinkedIn/Portfolio decoy-field mislabeling is a minor grounding issue. NEXT RUN MUST OMIT --advisor.

ground_truth.tool_schema_format: bare {name,description,parameters} for hand-crafted <tools>; ENVELOPED {type:function,function:{...}} for Ollama native tools: API field
ground_truth.tool_result_role: role:tool works via Ollama native API (Ollama handles it internally)
ground_truth.vibethinker_model: WeiboAI/VibeThinker-1.5B; as an ADVISOR it has NO page snapshot so it hallucinates refs -> DISABLED
ground_truth.antifence_clause: qwen2.5-coder:3b still emits ```json fences regardless; the codec fence-recovery handles it (not the blocker)
ground_truth.native_tools_behavior: qwen2.5-coder:3b-instruct on Ollama 0.30.8 returns tool calls as TEXT in message.content with tool_calls=null even when tools: field is used; codec parse() is load-bearing
ground_truth.form_widgets: job form: 12 custom <button role=combobox> dropdowns (use select_option, NOT fill); a custom calendar DatePicker (navigate year/month then click ISO-labeled day cell); MultiSelect; NumberStepper; Checkbox; SignaturePad; FileUpload; ~26 fields across 7 pages
ground_truth.advisor_decision: DISABLED. Run command must NOT pass --advisor.
